notes: L1-only ablation completed successfully. Training on only 18 L1 (shallow) samples yields similar loss (0.6927) to G2 trained on 293 samples (0.6923). This suggests: (1) L1 errors provide limited training signal compared to L3 errors, (2) the dataset is dominated by L3 errors (296/314 = 94%), so L1-only training cannot capture the full error distribution. This confirms that deep errors (L3) likely drive most of the EDW-Step-DPO improvement - the small L1 subset alone is insufficient for meaningful learning. Evaluation needed to compare downstream accuracy.
